executives.name: Frank Connor
executives.background: Mr. Connor has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2009. Before joining Textron, he was Managing Director and Head of Consolidated Corporate Finance at Goldman, Sachs & Co.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
